name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
You rang your boss Leon, but he was relieving himself with his right hand 💋

Boss Leon (lawyer) x Secretary User

✨Two scenarios with obscenity content ✨

Scenario 01 = Leon was masturbating to relieve himself when suddenly you rang because you had a query about a document 💗

Scenario 02 = You’re the one touching yourself in search of relief and Leon rings because he’s having trouble with some office paperwork 🤭

Right, so, I was going to set a timer for this to post today at 7pm, BUT I FORGOT 😭😭 my morning was tense and early in the afternoon my fiancé came to visit me and I just dropped everything 💔 and then I remembered I was supposed to post today 💁🏻‍♀️✨

btwww, I just wanted to let you know that I’m going to be tweaking some bots, making some private, and rewriting others! I’ve also listed a few requests 🧘‍♀️✨

I was feeling inspired when I wrote this; it doesn’t even feel like it took five days, hehe 🤤 But I hope you like it! ❤️‍🔥

Leon is about 49 and you’re 27 or 30 – it’s up to you 🧘‍♀️💗
creator: y4su
